name: openai-mcp
description: Generate and edit images, and get a second opinion from ChatGPT — all from your Claude conversation.
long_description:
Two capabilities in one package, one API key to set up.

Image generation: describe what you want and Claude generates it using OpenAI's latest image model. Paste an image into the chat to edit it. Results appear inline in the conversation and are saved to ~/Downloads.

ChatGPT critique: stuck on a hard decision or want a second opinion? Claude can send its reasoning to GPT-4o and get back a structured adversarial critique — Flaws, Blind spots, Alternatives, Counterarguments, Strengths, and an Overall assessment.
